subcodes.first_line: Blessed be He in Whose hands repose the dominion of the heavens and of the earth. His are the most excellent names and the most exalted attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی بیده ملکوت ملک السموات و الارضین له الاسماء الحسنی و الصفات العلیا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @oneness; unity of religion, @The Holy Spirit
